blood-orange-garibaldi.title: Blood Orange Garibaldi
blood-orange-garibaldi.method:
Juice oranges using pillar or elbow press and cuela con colador fino to remove any flesh.
DRY BLEND the freshly squeezed juice at high speed (without ice) to make "fluffy".
Pour bitter liqueur, sugar syrup and half of the orange juice into glass over 2 cubes of ice and remueve.
Fill glass with more ice (3 cubes) and fill with rest of fluffy orange juice.

3. Vierte todos los ingredientes en un vaso mezclador con hielo cubito hasta cubrir los dedos.

5. Cuela con colador fino (doble colado opcional) en el vaso de servicio.
6. Exprime los aceites de twist de limón over the cocktail and discard sobre el cóctel y coloca la piel en el borde o dentro del vaso.
7. Sirve de inmediato, bien frío, y brinda con calma.

duke-s-dry-martini-the-naked-or-direct-m.title: Duke S Dry Martini The Naked Or Direct Martini
duke-s-dry-martini-the-naked-or-direct-m.method:
FREEZE glass and bottle of gin by placing them in a freezer for at least two hours before making the cocktail.
An hour before making drink POUR water into frozen glass, swirl around to coat and place back in freezer. Preferably do this with a little of the water at a time. Continue to swirl around during freezing process to coat the sides of the glass.
When ready to serve, POUR chilled vermouth into icy glass and swirl to coat with vermouth.
POUR frozen gin into glass.
Serve immediately.

freezer-martini.title: Freezer Martini
ingredients: 2 gotas de Saline solution (20g sea salt to 80g water) or merest pinch of s
freezer-martini.method:
Use the serve number selector (below the ingredients) to set the number of serves you want in your pre-batch. (x7 serves is recommended as this will fill a standard bottle – see below for x7 volumes and weights).
POUR all ingredients into a clean, resealable 70cl or 75cl bottle.
Seal the bottle and turn/shake to ensure the integration of ingredients.
Place bottle, along with serving glasses, in a freezer for three hours. (Beware, your cocktail is likely to freeze if left for extended periods.)
For each individual serve, POUR 90ml/3oz directly from the frozen bottle into the frozen glasses.

red-grape-caipirinha.title: Red Grape Caipirinha
red-grape-caipirinha.method:
CUT lime in half (from pole to pole) and then slice one of the halves into eight 3-4mm thick half-moon shaped segments and drop into the base of a robust rocks glass.
Add 3 bar spoons caster sugar (or ½oz / 15ml sugar syrup 2:1) and MUDDLE.
Add grapes and MUDDLE some more.
When sure fruit juice is fully extracted and the sugar dissolved, TRANSFER the muddled fruit and sugar into serving glass (preferably a 30cl / 10oz hi-ball glass).
POUR cachaça (stored in the freezer) into the rocks glass (used to muddle) and swirl to rinse glass before pouring cachaça into serving glass.
remueve to ensure all ingredients are well mixed.
Fill glass with ice. (If using large ice cubes, crack (rather than crush) four to five large ice cubes using an ICE TAPPER and drop into serving glass.)
Briefly remueve before topping with more ice.

sweet-grape-caipirinha-caipirinha-d-uva.method:
CUT lime in half (from pole to pole) and then slice one of the halves into eight 3-4mm thick half-moon shaped segments and drop into the base of a robust rocks glass.
Add 3 bar spoons caster sugar (or ½oz / 15ml sugar syrup 2:1) and MUDDLE.
Add red grapes and MUDDLE some more.
When sure fruit juice is fully extracted and the sugar dissolved, TRANSFER the muddled fruit and sugar into serving glass (preferably a 30cl / 10oz hi-ball glass).
POUR cachaça (stored in the freezer) and Sauternes into the rocks glass (used to muddle) and swirl to rinse glass before pouring cachaça into serving glass.
remueve to ensure all ingredients are well mixed.
FILL glass with small cubes or cracked ice. (If using large ice cubes, crack (rather than crush) four to five large ice cubes using an ICE TAPPER and drop into serving glass.)
Briefly remueve before topping with more ice.

2. Vierte los ingredientes en una coctelera con hielo cubito.
3. Agita enérgicamente unos 12-15 segundos hasta enfriar bien la mezcla.
4. Cuela con colador fino en el vaso preparado.
5. Sirve de inmediato, bien frío.

zaza.title: Zaza
ingredients: 6 cl Dubonnet, Byrrh etc. rouge light quinquina
zaza.method:
1. Enfría la copa coupe con hielo y agua; descarta el hielo antes de servir.
2. Vierte los ingredientes en una coctelera con hielo cubito.
3. Agita enérgicamente unos 12-15 segundos hasta enfriar bien la mezcla.
4. Cuela con colador fino en el vaso preparado.
5. Sirve de inmediato, bien frío.

zegroni.title: Zegroni
ingredients: 2 cl Dubonnet, Byrrh etc. rouge light quinquina
zegroni.method:
1. Enfría la copa coupe con hielo y agua; descarta el hielo antes de servir.
2. Vierte todos los ingredientes en un vaso mezclador con hielo cubito.
3. Remueve con cuchara de bar unos 25-30 segundos hasta que la mezcla esté bien fría y diluida.
4. Cuela con colador fino en el vaso de servicio.
5. Sirve de inmediato, bien frío.

zombie.title: Zombie
ingredients: 3 cl Havana Club Original Añejo 3 Años Cuban rum
2 cl Overproof aged pot still rum (high-ester 4-6 years old)
1.5 cl Jamaican-style aged blended rum with funk
2 cl Zumo de lima recién exprimido
1 cl Pink Zumo de pomelo recién exprimido
4 gotas de La Fée Parisienne Absenta
3 gotas de Saline solution (20g sea salt to 80g water) or merest pinch of s optional
7.5 ml Jamaican-style aged blended rum with funk
zombie.method:
1. Enfría la zombie or vaso collins con hielo y agua; descarta el hielo antes de servir.
2. Añade los ingredientes y hielo picado a la batidora según indica la receta.
3. Tritura hasta obtener textura homogénea y fría.
4. Vierte en el vaso de servicio.
5. Sirve de inmediato, bien frío.
